para_trans: Regarding the name of Ms. Neha Radha Ravi Shankar Dave, Law Officer (Group-A), Director General of Police, Maharashtra State, Mumbai on the establishment.
Government Correctional Certificate No: DPP-1125 / Q.No.208 / POL-10
Madam Kama Marg, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,

Department of Home Affairs, Government Order No. DPP-1125 / P.No.208 / Pol-10, D. As per the Government Order dated 09.01.2026, one Legal Advisor and two Law Officers (Group-A) have been appointed on the establishment of the Director General of Police, Maharashtra State, Mumbai. The said Government Order is being amended as "Ms. Neha Radha Ravi Shankar Dave in place of Smt. Neha Radha Ravi Shankar Dave."
2. This Government Corrigendum is issued by the Government of Maharashtra = www.maharashtra.gov.in.
